channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 16th March
item.description:
Give and take 28 day please cut back overgrown hedge and brambles and vegetation approx 30 metres x 2 m (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in centre of road, 16th March
item.description:
Outside entrance to Ethridges

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elkstone, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stump of tree removed by trees dept. Large cone left by contractor but no remedial work completed to the pavement, 16th March
item.description:
On the 26th March a Tree stump was removed from outside 17 Kings Road by contractors BGG on behalf of the Trees and Green Spaces Council Department. The contractors left a very large traffic cone over the uneven ground left by the extraction of the stump and said that the Council would be along shortly to level the area to make it safe for pedestrians. We are also worried that in a high wind or storm the Bollard will do damage to our car as it is parked only inches away from it. Or possibly a vandal will kick it or, as sometimes happens, put it on the roof of our car. Please look into this and let us know what is happening. My phone number is 07881 940859 or janewatsonj25@gmail.com. Many thanks Jane Watson

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Kings Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Overgrown trees in garden, 16th March
item.description:
Several overgrown trees in rear garden of 2 Deep Street. These pose a real/potential hazard to numbers 1 - 5 Lynworth Terrace in Blacksmiths Lane as well as to overhead telephone and power cables should a storm bring one or more of them down. This has been an potential issue for many years as little or no maintenance has been done to the trees for well over a decade.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Blacksmiths Lane, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Ash Tree located on private land

item.title: Suspension damaging, 16th March
item.description:
This is a fairly busy road, close to some shops. The noise from vehicles hitting this is evident

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Blacksmith Lane, Churchdown, Gloucester

item.title: The pavement outside the gateway to Ashley Manor school has several potholes, 16th March
item.description:
The area of pavement outside the gateway to Ashley Manor school and the public carpark has several potholes and is in a bad state of repair. It makes using the pavement difficult especially for people with mobility issues and at night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashley Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Red Barriers lying on pavement, 16th March
item.description:
Left side of College road just before pedestrian crossing approaching High Street from the south in Cheltenham. You can see pedestrian crossing traffic light in photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): College Road, Fairview, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 16th March
item.description:
Please find attached a few photos on Gloucester place in Cheltenham which is in terrible state. Please can you look into getting this road resurfaced urgently. The pot holes are now unavoidable.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 slabs sunken. Lady tripped and fell this morning, 16th March
item.description:
In front of Classy Nails in Pittville street Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pittville Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
